base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their early thirties, of Mediterranean descent, with straight blonde hair and sharp hazel eyes, a calm, neutral expression. natural light from a side window. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. lookalikes.prompt: A female presenting individual in her early 30s with fair skin, leaning against a weathered brick wall in a quiet alley, wearing a casual denim jacket. Her eyebrows are thick and straight. Her nose is narrow with a prominent bridge and a pointed tip. Her lips are full with a less defined cupid's bow. Her face is heart-shaped, with high, prominent cheekbones and a slightly shorter face length. She has no freckles. Her expression is calm, looking directly at the viewer, with her head tilted slightly to the right. Three-quarter body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
